session.user: Run these two commands in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results: 1. `ty check src/ packages/ tests/` 2. `ruff check src/ packages/ tests/` Do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run both type checking and linting commands for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/ packages/ tests/
Run pyright type checking on src, packages, and tests directories

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ packages/ tests/
Run ruff linting on src, packages, and tests directories

session.tool_result:
